evidence.evidence_text: due to the addition of hybrid steel and polypropylene ﬁbers have been studied. The properties were investigated include bulk density and work- ability of fresh concrete as well as compressive strength, ﬂexural tensile strength, splitting tensile strength and toughness of hardened concrete.
